summary.zh: 面向 AI 行业资讯的自动化简报工具，贯通多源采集、智能摘要、去重与飞书定时推送。
summary.en: An automated AI industry briefing tool connecting multi-source collection, intelligent summarization, deduplication, and scheduled Feishu delivery.

description.zh: 系统定时从多个 RSS 新闻源抓取内容，通过 NVIDIA NIM 大模型完成新闻筛选、去重和结构化摘要，并在每天 09:00 与 19:00 自动推送至飞书群。配套 Web 管理界面支持资讯源管理、推送时间配置、手动执行、运行记录查看和异常告警，将找新闻、读新闻、整理重点与发送简报整合为自动化流水线。
description.en: The system collects stories from multiple RSS feeds, uses NVIDIA NIM models to filter, deduplicate, and produce structured summaries, then delivers them to Feishu groups at 09:00 and 19:00 each day. Its web console manages sources and schedules, supports manual runs, exposes execution history, and handles failure alerts, turning news discovery, reading, synthesis, and delivery into one automated pipeline.

role.zh: 自动化流程设计、RSS 数据采集、NVIDIA NIM 摘要链路、飞书推送、Web 管理界面与运行监控
role.en: Automation workflow design, RSS ingestion, NVIDIA NIM summarization pipeline, Feishu delivery, web administration, and runtime monitoring

outcome.zh: 完成支持多资讯源、每日两次定时推送、智能去重与摘要、手动任务、运行记录和异常告警的模块化开源简报系统。
outcome.en: Delivered a modular open-source briefing system with multiple news sources, twice-daily scheduled delivery, intelligent deduplication and summaries, manual jobs, run history, and failure alerts.

alt.zh: Daily-Report-Robot 从 RSS 聚合、AI 摘要到定时推送与 Web 管理的功能总览
alt.en: Daily-Report-Robot overview from RSS aggregation and AI summaries to scheduled delivery and web administration

alt.zh: AI 行业资讯在每天 09:00 和 19:00 自动推送至飞书群的流程
alt.en: AI industry briefings automatically delivered to Feishu groups at 09:00 and 19:00

alt.zh: 用于管理 RSS 源、推送计划、运行历史和手动任务的 Web 控制台
alt.en: Web console for managing RSS sources, delivery schedules, run history, and manual jobs

alt.zh: 基于 NVIDIA NIM 的资讯聚合、智能提炼、去重和结构化简报生成流程
alt.en: NVIDIA NIM pipeline for news aggregation, intelligent synthesis, deduplication, and structured briefing generation

alt.zh: 由采集、摘要、去重、格式化、发送、管理和调度模块组成的自动化架构
alt.en: Modular automation architecture covering collection, summarization, deduplication, formatting, delivery, administration, and scheduling

alt.zh: Daily-Report-Robot 开源 AI 行业资讯自动化推送主视觉
alt.en: Daily-Report-Robot open-source AI industry briefing automation key visual
